subject: english
topic_title: Essay Writing: Various Methods of Introducing Writings
learning_objectives: State the features of a good essay
Identify major essay types in the note
Apply essay-writing guidance in composition work

sections.heading: Features of a Good Essay
sections.content: The note lists rich content, orderly presentation, correct use of language, effective punctuation, and mechanical accuracy.

sections.heading: Types of Essay
sections.content: The note discusses narrative, descriptive, expository, and argumentative essays, with brief explanations and examples of topics.
